title: Abyssal Baths
description:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with [blue]salt[/blue] and something [green]unmistakably organic[/green].

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

options.title: Immerse
options.description: Gain [green]2[/green] Max HP. Take [red]3[/red] unblockable, unpowered damage.

options.title: Linger
options.description: Gain [green]2[/green] Max HP. Take unblockable, unpowered damage that escalates (starts at [red]4[/red] damage after first immersion).

options.title: Exit Baths
options.description: The heat finally gets to you, and you hop out of the bath.

notes: [gold]Immerse[/gold] locks you into a repeating loop. Each action (initial immersion and subsequent lingerings) grants [green]2 Max HP[/green] and deals [red]3[/red], [red]4[/red], [red]5[/red]... damage respectively (all [red]unblockable, unpowered[/red]). Net HP cost per linger: 1 HP, then 2 HP, 3 HP, etc., since you always gain 2 Max HP simultaneously. The flavor text escalates through 9 linger stages—from increasingly desperate (LINGER1-3) to frantic (LINGER4), then surreal (LINGER5-9). If lingering would reduce your current HP to 0 or below, a [sine][red]death warning[/red][/sine] appears, but you can still attempt it (which will kill you) or [gold]Exit Baths[/gold]. [gold]Abstain[/gold] is available only from the initial choice and immediately heals [green]10 HP[/green] and ends the event safely.
